name: Falls Road
intro: Operation: Reclaim the Falls. Doors in, invaders out — same as always.
outro: The Falls is ours again. On to the next street, lads.

name: Shankill
intro: Operation: Hold the Shankill. Davy's people are with us now — don't shoot the orange sashes.
outro: Shankill's clear. Never thought I'd cheer for an Orangeman. Aye, needs must.

name: The Markets
intro: Operation: Take the Markets. Tight wee streets — keep your back to a wall.
outro: The Markets are back in business. Belfast trade, not invader loot.

name: The Docks
intro: Operation: Storm the Docks. They came off boats — send them back the same way.
outro: The Docks are sealed. Nothing foreign sailing into Belfast tonight.

name: Ardoyne
intro: Operation: Break the Ardoyne line. They've dug in deep — kick harder.
outro: Ardoyne stands. The line held, so it did.

name: Short Strand
intro: Operation: Relieve the Short Strand. Outnumbered, surrounded — perfect.
outro: Short Strand holds out, like it always has. Both flags flying now.

name: Divis Tower
intro: Operation: Crown the Divis. Last invader command post in the city is up top. Finish it.
outro: Divis is ours. Belfast is liberated — green, orange and all. Now get to the chopper.
